text.title: Launch RACI Template Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft 2020-12) for the Launch RACI Template artefact. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints.

example.note: missing launch_id + lead; workstream has empty R + empty A; no phase enum; no pre/day/post coverage.

antipattern.description: Status set to an approved/sent state by the producing agent without a human reviewer entry.
Required field empty or replaced with a placeholder (n/a, unknown) without an anchored reason.
Prose paragraph stuffed into a field the schema declares as array or object.
